© 2020

Publications

Keeping this up to date as best as I can. You might find a more up to date list on my google scholar profile.

2020

Taylor, N., Hofer, M., & Nelson, J. D. (2020). The Paradox of Help Seeking in the Entropy Mastermind Game. Frontiers in Education 5, 168   [pdf]

Hofer, M., Verhoef, T., & Levy, R. P. (2020). Hierarchical Inferences Support Systematicity in the Lexicon. Proceedings of the 42nd Annual Meeting of the Cognitive Science Society, pp. 2398–2404.   [pdf]

Ivanova, A., & Hofer, M. (2020). Linguistic Overhypotheses in Category Learning: Explaining the Label Advantage Effect. Proceedings of the 42nd Annual Meeting of the Cognitive Science Society, pp. 2323–2330.   [pdf]

Bertram, L., Schulz, E., Hofer, M., & Nelson, J. D. (2020). Emotion, entropy evaluations and subjective uncertainty. Proceedings of the 42st Annual Meeting of the Cognitive Science Society, pp. 1457–1463.   [pdf]

2019

Hofer, M., & Levy, R. P. (2019). Iconicity and Structure in the Emergence of Combinatoriality. Proceedings of the 41st Annual Meeting of the Cognitive Science Society, pp. 442–448.   [pdf]

Schulz, E., Bertram, L., Hofer, M., & Nelson, J. D. (2020). Exploring the Space of Human Exploration using Entropy Mastermind. Proceedings of the 41st Annual Meeting of the Cognitive Science Society, pp. 1457–1463.   [pdf]

2018

Shen, J., Hofer, M., Felbo, B., & Levy, R. P. (2018). Comparing Models of Associative Meaning: An Empirical Investigation of Reference in Simple Language Games. Proceedings of the Twenty-Second Conference on Computational Natural Language Learning (CoNLL), pp. 292–301.   [pdf]

2017

Hofer, M., & Levy, R. P. (2017). Modeling Sources of Uncertainty in Spoken Word Learning. Proceedings of the 39th Annual Meeting of the Cognitive Science Society, pp. 550–555.   [pdf]
